{{Quote|Sith Lord called Dakron was visiting the Krikthasi homeworld two years back. Krikthasi are a private, ugly people—look like ribbon jelly. Lord Dakron wants to know Krikthasi history. They don't want to share, so he boils their capital. Krikthasi Massacre.|Agent Protarius|<ref name="TOR:ToO">{{TORcite|type=heroic|Target of Opportunity|Balmorra}}</ref>}}
'''Baralou''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Varada sector/Legends|Varada sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was the homeworld of the [[Krikthasi]] and the [[Multopos]].

==Description==
Baralou was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Baralou system/Legends|Baralou system]]. It was a warm, wet world home to two native [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]], the [[Krikthasi]] and the [[Multopos]], along with many aquatic species and poisonous plants. The world was nearly completely covered by [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] with only several chains of small islands above [[Water/Legends|water]]. The planet's four [[Moon/Legends|moons]] caused violent storms and had a tremendous influence on the tides, sometimes resulting in tidal shifts of over fifty [[Meter/Legends|meters]].

Baralou contained many mineral and natural resources. The internal pressures of the planet formed a tremendous amount and variety of gemstones. [[Ruby/Legends|Rubies]], [[sasho gem]]s, [[Kuggerag/Legends|kuggerags]], [[Diamond/Legends|diamonds]], and [[jasse heart]]s were just a few of the gemstones that could be found on most of the islands. Most islands had a large amount of plant growth, most of which was special in two ways. First, the plants and trees had very deep reaching root systems to anchor against the tidal waves and tides. Second, most plants, including the native [[Fruit/Legends|fruits]] and [[Vegetable/Legends|vegetables]], bore at least traces of poison that affected most non-natives.

Baralou's oceans teemed with aquatic life. Many primitive plants grew beneath the waters, including [[bestrum algae]] and various aquatic grasses. Brightly colored [[Fish/Legends|fish]] could be found everywhere. Some species of note were the [[treppok]] and [[grotseth]].

The two native populations, both stone age cultures, did not enjoy good relations. The amphibious Multopos, while friendly to [[Free-trader|traders]], were traditional enemies of the undersea dwelling Krikthasi.

The [[Aqualis Food Conglomerate]] operated on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==History==
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Dakron]] destroyed Baralou's capital city and [[Krikthasi Massacre|slaughtered]] its inhabitants.<ref name="TOR:ToO" />

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] had a small presence on the Baralou in the form of [[Aqualis Base]], which provided many foodstuffs for the Alliance during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
